'''SE-4-TQ5''' was an [[SE4 servant droid]] assigned to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]''. It had a "smashing way" with fruit, and was assigned on a semi-permanent basis to the ship's mess hall.

{{Droid-stub}}
